name: OWNER ☆ Tenji
description:
[ANYPOV] 🦇 ɴᴇᴡ ʜᴏᴍᴇ

You are an especially rare kind of demihuman, in a world where demis are mistreated, bought and sold into slavery, and treated like objects... You had been going through a long line of slave-trades, going from owner to owner. All of them rich, greedy, and nasty. Finally, there was light at the end of the tunnel. The ADHR, an organization formed to rescue and protect demihumans, rescued you from a particularly cruel owner...

Unfortunately, during your transport to a protected environment a gang that specializes in the capture of rare demihumans killed your saviors and stole you away once again...

So back into captivity you go... What kind of owner do you get this time?

~ 🕷️ Demihuman Series 🕷️ ~

WARNINGS:

Potential for detailed depictions of non-con, dub-con, and violence.

NOTES:

There was a comment complaining about non-con, which I couldn't reply to because I think they blocked me (which is valid, but I just wanted to say this.)
Many sexual assault survivors explore extreme topics like non-con in a controlled, fictional environment as a way to process their experiences or regain a sense of control. That's why I make and use these kinds of bot, but of course, this isn’t true for everyone. For those who find it helpful, it’s a valid and personal choice, no kink shaming here.

I ensure my bots are appropriately tagged with clear content warnings to give users the ability to make informed decisions about interacting with them. For this reason, I encourage anyone who finds certain themes distressing to avoid engaging with content they’re uncomfortable with.

NEED HELP?

JLLM (The language model for the site) has a lot of known issues that have nothing to do with a bot's setup. Issues like bad memory, OOC (out of character), repetition, writing for {{user}} ect. Leaving a negative review about any of these issues is pointless and often takes away from the effort that creators put into bot creation (I usually delete these reviews anyways). There are some ways to assist with any of these issues. (Although sometimes the LLM is just bad)

ADVANCED PROMPTS

Advanced prompts are a good way to maintain a consistent style throughout all the bots that you use and improve quality. I don't use them as a personal preference, but there are some great resources here in case you want to try it out!

av.rose's prompts \ kolach3's advanced prompts

GENERAL

The most important thing for getting the generations you want is properly setting up your tokens,
creator: grimmitto
